requiredCriteria.label: Role identity
requiredCriteria.description: States a credible role identity for this JD without pretending unsupported direct-fit experience.

requiredCriteria.label: Relevant capability
requiredCriteria.description: Surfaces the strongest supported capabilities that overlap with the JD.

requiredCriteria.label: Business value
requiredCriteria.description: Explains the business or stakeholder value of the candidate's supported work.

requiredCriteria.label: Evidence grounding
requiredCriteria.description: Avoids unsupported ownership, metrics, seniority, sales, architecture, or cloud-delivery claims.

requiredCriteria.label: Customer context
requiredCriteria.description: Connects the Summary to customer, stakeholder, adoption, enablement, or operating context when supported.

requiredCriteria.label: Career positioning
requiredCriteria.description: Separates supported transferable fit from unsupported core requirements.

requiredCriteria.label: Clarity
requiredCriteria.description: Uses concise external recruiter language without generic filler or tool stuffing.

unsupportedCoreRequirements.requirement: 7+ years technology sales or account management experience
unsupportedCoreRequirements.reason: Evidence shows project execution and a sales specialist title but not 7+ years of quota-carrying sales or account management.

unsupportedCoreRequirements.requirement: Leading large cloud engagements for enterprise customers
unsupportedCoreRequirements.reason: No evidence of leading Azure, infrastructure migration, application modernization, or large global cloud engagements.

unsupportedCoreRequirements.requirement: Executive relationship building and customer buy-in
unsupportedCoreRequirements.reason: Stakeholder coordination is supported, but executive relationship ownership and commercial buy-in are not.
Vendor coordination is not equivalent to partner co-selling or ISV opportunity ownership.

unsupportedCoreRequirements.requirement: Business cases, proposals, negotiation, and deal closure
unsupportedCoreRequirements.reason: Source supports coordination around bidding and negotiation but not proposal ownership, revenue, contract closure, or competitive displacement.

unsupportedCoreRequirements.requirement: Pipeline management, forecasting, and quota attainment
unsupportedCoreRequirements.reason: No evidence of sales pipeline, forecast, quota, or cloud-consumption ownership.

unsupportedCoreRequirements.requirement: Azure, IaaS, PaaS, migration, and modernization knowledge
unsupportedCoreRequirements.reason: Evidence does not establish Azure platform, IaaS/PaaS, cloud economics, migration, or modernization depth.

Keep genuine fit gaps out of visible strengths.

checks.label: Must-have keywords
checks.value: 2/11 covered · 9 unsupported keyword(s) intentionally not forced

checks.label: Evidence coverage
checks.value: 4/18 priority evidence IDs show up in visible bullets

checks.label: Overclaim risk
checks.value: No flagged risky claims remain visible

positives: Visible target title is "Microsoft Ecosystem Solution Enablement Specialist".
Power Platform / M365 signals are visible: power automate, power apps, sharepoint, m365, support, workflow.

Addresses manager pain points: Insufficient qualified Azure pipeline; Deals stalled by technical, licensing, legal, or deployment blockers; Failure to convert technical interest into consumption and revenue.
Shows success signals: Quota attainment; Azure consumption growth; Closed enterprise deals.
8 work bullets give enough screening substance.
risks: Screening Analysis marks this JD as Avoid; do not submit without changing target strategy.
4 JD requirement(s) are only weakly supported; avoid making them headline claims.
Summary quality is acceptable, but remaining direct-fit concerns are application-fit risk.
Too many bullets describe activity without clear manager-facing action or outcome.
rewriteRequired: Do not export this CV for the current JD unless the target role strategy changes.
Remove unsupported JD requirements from visible claims; keep them as gaps, not resume promises.
Rewrite weakly supported requirements as conservative operational support, not expert ownership.

checks.value: Gate passed with 1 manual title fix
